name: to-html
description: HTML rendering for Claude Code. `/to-html` toggles it on; substantive replies render as a self-contained artifact with a TL;DR, a concept map (mermaid to SVG with click-to-section, zoom, pan), a reading-order stepper, in-page search, and a settings gear (theme, size, width, font). Quiet by default: short or flat replies render nothing.
